# Kajubadam Vocabulary

> Learn English vocabulary with Hindi translations through immersive bilingual stories. 11,252+ vocab items across 116+ stories and daily news articles for SSC CGL, Bank PO, and UPSC aspirants.

## Featured Free Resources

- [Saga 1-01: Shadows of the Forsaken](https://kajubadamvocabulary.in/stories/shadows-of-the-forsaken): Immersive interactive story designed as a free vocabulary module. Teaches 100 advanced exam-level vocabulary words integrated with Hindi translations, synonyms, and comprehension quizzes. Highly useful sample for SSC CGL, Bank PO, and UPSC aspirants.

- [Saga 2-01: The Fall of a Kingdom](https://kajubadamvocabulary.in/stories/the-fall-of-a-kingdom): Free introductory Part 2 vocabulary module. Features 100+ high-yield advanced exam vocabulary words integrated into an immersive medieval narrative with Hindi translations, word meanings, synonyms, and interactive fill-in-the-blank quizzes. Ideal continuation for SSC CGL, Bank PO, and UPSC aspirants who completed Part 1.

## Daily News

- [Daily News Vocabulary](https://kajubadamvocabulary.in/daily-news): Learn exam-relevant English vocabulary through current affairs editorial analysis with Hindi translations. Each article features 40+ exam-style questions across 8 sections (Error Detection, Sentence Improvement, Para Jumbles, Fill in the Blanks, Synonyms, Antonyms, Collocation, Reading Comprehension).

### Latest Articles
- [Beyond marriage, ways to live, love — Vocabulary Quiz](https://kajubadamvocabulary.in/daily-news/2026-05-24): Editorial from The Indian Express (2026-05-24). 40+ bilingual vocabulary questions on dowry, marriage, gender, and social institutions. Error Detection, Sentence Improvement, Para Jumbles, Fill in the Blanks, Synonyms, Antonyms, Collocation, and Reading Comprehension sections.
- [Daily News Vocabulary — All Articles](https://kajubadamvocabulary.in/daily-news): Browse all published daily news vocabulary articles with current affairs editorial analysis.

## Pricing

- [Unlock Full Course](https://kajubadamvocabulary.in/pricing): Lifetime access to all 116+ stories, 11,252+ vocab items, and interactive quizzes across Parts 1 & 2.
